name: Herman's Corn Bread Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add shallots and onion, and cook until soft. Add chicken livers, nuts, and garlic; continue cooking, stirring constantly, until livers are just firm.
2. Stir in the wine-fruit mixture and cook over high heat for 2 minutes. Transfer to a large mixing bowl and blend in the remaining ingredients.
3. Stuffing can be prepared up to 3 days ahead. Cover and store in the refrigerator, or freeze up to 1 month. Thaw completely in the refrigerator before using. Leftover, cooked stuffing can be frozen. Makes enough stuffing for a 12-15 pound turkey.
